query: what embedding model does rag-base use
expected_answer: BAAI/bge-m3 at 1024 dimensions, served by TEI on port 8081.

notes: BM25 path must rank this above dense; expected_via asserts BM25 channel actually contributed (not just that the chunk was found by some path).

query: which library that React depends on does Node.js also use
expected_answer: JavaScript: React depends on it as a UI library; Node.js uses it as the runtime language.
notes: expected_via=['graph'] asserts LightRAG's graph channel surfaced this; expected_entity_path asserts the actual traversal path exists in Memgraph (the harness queries the graph to verify).
expected_blurb_visible asserts the contextual blurb prefix on the chunk is what disambiguated language vs reptile. Without the blurb, dense embeddings collapse the two.

expected_answer: The first React install option is npm install react.
notes: Chunk text 'the first one is...' is meaningless without surrounding context. The contextual_blurb prefix added at Phase 4 ('Section: React installation options') is what makes this retrievable. expected_blurb_visible asserts the prefix is on the returned chunk; expected_via=['semantic'] asserts dense embeddings (now contextualized) caught it.

query: summarize the entire postgres setup section
expected_answer: Postgres + pgvector 0.8.2 on port 5433, HNSW cosine index on chunks.embedding, GIN on tsvector, BM25 via ParadeDB pg_search after Phase 4.
notes: Multiple leaf chunks of the same parent section are hit; expected_parent_merged asserts the response returns the parent (~1024 token) chunk text, not just the leaves.

query: what is the secret meaning of the elder scrolls
notes: Negative query: must return empty or all results below min_score floor. Tests we do not hallucinate matches.

query: what reranker model does rag-base use
notes: Pair with gs_tt_001b. No time_scope: query returns the current (post-Phase-4) reranker. The validator checks gs_tt_001a and gs_tt_001b form a consistent pair.

query: what reranker model does rag-base use
notes: Pair with gs_tt_001a. valid_at predates the Phase 4 reranker swap, so the engine must filter chunks by valid_to and return the v1 spec doc instead. Tests bitemporal valid_at filter changes results.
